title: Best practices for setting up repeaters

messages.author: bobfa78
messages.content_html: Do we have a repeater “planner?”

messages.author: Jereme
messages.text: This would definitely be helpful. In Linn County Oregon USA we are working on adding 3 new towns with local repeaters. And trying to figure out best practices for excluding a lot of the unrelated general traffic coming in. Are there best practices for using regions yet to limit the amount of traffic we don't care about into our little region?
